# Approval Workflow Fixtures

Maps fixture files to `quickstart.md` validation scenarios.

| Fixture | Scenario |
|---------|----------|
| `mixed-subscription-proposals.json` | V1 — ingest creates pending proposals |
| `quantity-mismatch-proposal.json` | V2 — approve subscription quantity update |
| `mapping-ambiguous-investigation.json` | V4 — investigation item cannot approve |

Fixtures reference reconciliation input fixture names under `tests/fixtures/reconciliation/`.
